creator: xaa@stack.nl
text:
The wise Bill Fenner produced the following lines:
> xaa@stack.nl wrote:
> >+DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}.tgz kaffe-0.9.1-package-biss-net.com.tgz \
> >+		kaffe-0.9.1-package-javasoft.com.tgz
> 
> Does it make sense to just s/kaffe-0.9.1/${DISTNAME}/, since all
> you changed on these 2 lines seems to have been the old distname
> to the new one?
> 
Well, at least for the kaffe-0.9.1-package-javasoft.com.tgz I hope I'm
not gonna have to do that again. It's too big to download each and
everytime. (Being just the classes.zip file, that should be constant
unless kaffe or some other project comes up with a replacement that is
freely distributable and good enough to take the place of Sun's stuff)

Mark
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Mark Huizer  - xaa@stack.nl     - rcbamh@urc.tue.nl                   -
